nasb.text: They will pass through the land hard-pressed and famished, and it will turn out that when they are hungry, they will be enraged and curse their king and their God as they face upward.

esv.text: They will pass through the land, greatly distressed and hungry. And when they are hungry, they will be enraged and will speak contemptuously against their king and their God, and turn their faces upward.

cnv.text: 他們必經過這地，受困迫、受飢餓；他們飢餓的時候，就惱怒，咒罵自己的王和自己的　神；

ccb.text: 他们必困苦，饥饿，到处流浪，并在饥饿中怒气冲冲地咒骂他们的君王，亵渎上帝。

csbs.text: 他们必经过这地，遭困苦，受饥饿。他们饥饿的时候就发怒，仰面朝天，诅咒自己的君王和自己的神；
